text:
The Nostrade Butler was the butler of the Nostrade Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 

Appearance

The butler was an old man with short, and fair hair parted on the right. He had prominent wrinkles on his forehead and underneath his eyes, a long-shaped head, sharp cheeks, and a thick mustache. He wore a dark-colored suit with a cravat. 

Personality

He was a cordial and taciturn individual. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The butler welcomes Kurapika to the Nostrade's Mansion and leads him to the room where the other bodyguard applicants are waiting. During the client's explanation of the job's prerequisite, the butler passes around data cards listing all of the desired items. A group of armed assailants suddenly storms the room, and the butler is killed after Baise uses him as a human shield to protect herself from the hail of bullets. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 1999 anime adaptation, the butler leaves the room after handing out the data cards to the bodyguard applicants. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 48 (1999) 
In the 2011 anime adaptation, Baise uses her ability on the butler to force him to die while acting as a human shield for her. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 40 (2011)
